action: Create a fail-closed runtime adapter that permits only the target team to terminalize a peer trigger and appends only after composite proof verification.

progress.finding: Terminal execution evidence is an occurrence authored by the target team, not by the scheduler or requester. The terminal record must be proof-gated and idempotent.
progress.verification: 7 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical candidate source before commit

handoff: Replace the process-local terminal index with a durable compare-and-set journal, wire verifyPeerExecutionProof as verifyPacket, and require the target automation to emit terminal records after its own evidence packet is complete.
